title: valeriana micrantha var. wyomingensis
intro: Valeriana micrantha var. wyomingensis is a subspecies of the valerian plant, a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anxiolytic effects, due to the presence of valepotriates and valerenic acids. The plant has been used to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Valeriana micrantha var. wyomingensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
